name: Green tea extract / EGCG
summary: Decision-ready summary: Green tea extract / EGCG is best framed for fat oxidation support; cardiometabolic markers; antioxidant polyphenol intake; safety screen: liver disease; high-dose fasting use; stimulant sensitivity.
description: EGCG-rich green tea extracts are linked to metabolic improvements through polyphenol-mediated effects on fat oxidation and inflammatory/redox signaling, with moderate confidence.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.
claimMap.notes: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.
